title: salix × eriophora
intro: Salix × eriophora, also known as the Eriophora willow or hybrid willow, is a plant that belongs to the Salix genus and is a hybrid of the white willow (Salix alba) and the goosely willow (Salix candida). The medicinal properties of Salix × eriophora include its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties due to the presence of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of this plant include reducing pain and inflammation, treating headaches and menstrual cramps, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and fibromyalgia. The herbal preparations of Salix × eriophora include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
